Chain Parts.name: Bicycle Chain
Chain Parts.description: S-56: CHAIN 1/2" X 3/32" (MTB OR RACER) | S-57: CHAIN 1/2" X 1/8" (REGULAR)

specifications.finish: AVAILABLE IN BLACK, NP AND BCP FINISH

Chain Parts.visual_notes: Shows two precision parallel-link chains. S-56 (narrower, multi-speed) and S-57 (wider, single-speed), both in black finish.

Chain Parts.name: Chain Connecting Links
Chain Parts.visual_notes: Small black master link / connecting link. Includes open and closed link variants.

Chain Parts.name: Chain Roll
Chain Parts.visual_notes: Heavy-duty bulk spool of black chain with a four-armed cross-brace structure on a wire stand.

Chain Parts.name: Shelco Cut Chain Wheel
Chain Parts.visual_notes: Classic single-speed crankset with a bright chrome 48T chainring with decorative cut windows and a polished 7" round chrome crank arm.

Chain Parts.name: Triple Chain Wheel with Black Guard
Chain Parts.description: TRIPLE CHAIN WHEEL WITH BLACK GUARD AND GREY PLASTIC COATED CRANK
Chain Parts.visual_notes: Modern multi-speed crankset with three chainrings (28/38/48T), integrated black plastic bash guard and grey plastic-coated crank arm.

Chain Parts.name: Single Speed Freewheel
Chain Parts.visual_notes: Single-speed freewheel cog, 18 teeth, smooth polished chrome silky finish. Features engraved SHELCO and TO UNSCREW text with directional arrow.

Chain Parts.name: Cotter Pin Set
Chain Parts.description: COTTER PIN SHORT CUT AND LONG CUT

specifications.nut_types: AVAILABLE WITH NYLOCK, DOM AND FLANGE NUT

Chain Parts.visual_notes: Hardware kit with four silver cotter pins in short and long cut varieties, plus silver washer/nut. Used for traditional crank arm attachment.

Chain Parts.name: Multispeed Freewheel Opener
Chain Parts.visual_notes: Two specialized socket removal tools. S-53: gold-colored socket with internal splines. S-54: standard silver-colored socket with internal splines.

Chain Parts.name: Chain Adjuster Open End
Chain Parts.visual_notes: Pair of silver zinc-plated chain adjusters for BMX or single-speed bikes with horizontal dropouts. Features a hooked open tensioning bolt end.

Chain Parts.name: Chain Adjuster Close End
Chain Parts.visual_notes: Pair of silver chain adjusters with a solid circular closed end eyelet on the tensioning bolt, as opposed to the hooked end on S-51.

Chain Parts.name: 6 Speed Freewheel Cluster
Chain Parts.visual_notes: Complete multi-speed freewheel cluster with six cogs (14-28T range). Distinctive deep semi-gloss brown/bronze chemical finish. Shown from 3/4 angle.

specifications.crank_sizes: 3.5" X 0.7" (C TO C) WITH THREE HOLES

specifications.compatibility: SINGLE SPEED SUITABLE FOR ONE PC CRANK 36T, 40T, 44T

Multi Speed Chainwheels.name: Single Speed Chainwheel with Plastic Chain Guard
Multi Speed Chainwheels.description: SINGLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL WITH PLASTIC CHAIN GUARD
Multi Speed Chainwheels.visual_notes: All-black component. The main chainring is covered by a matte black plastic disc guard. The crank arm is a matching deep black.

Multi Speed Chainwheels.name: Double Speed Chainwheel with Steel Chain Guard (Cottered)
Multi Speed Chainwheels.description: DOUBLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL WITH STEEL CHAIN GUARD (COTTERED)
Multi Speed Chainwheels.visual_notes: Traditional chrome double crankset with decorative cutouts and a chrome steel plate chain guard. Bright polished chrome crank arm, cottered bottom bracket design.

Multi Speed Chainwheels.name: Triple Speed Chainwheel with Steel Chain Guard (Cottered)
Multi Speed Chainwheels.description: TRIPLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL WITH STEEL CHAIN GUARD (COTTERED)
Multi Speed Chainwheels.visual_notes: Triple crankset with three bright chrome chainrings and a chrome steel plate chain guard. Bright polished chrome crank arm, cottered bottom bracket design.

Multi Speed Chainwheels.name: Triple Speed Chainwheel Plastic Coated Spider Crank with Plastic Chain Guard
Multi Speed Chainwheels.description: TRIPLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL PLASTIC COATED SPIDER CRANK WITH PLASTIC CHAIN GUARD
Multi Speed Chainwheels.visual_notes: Triple crankset with matte black plastic disc chain guard. Silver/light grey plastic-coated crank arm, cotterless (square taper) mounting. Inner rings are silver steel.

Multi Speed Chainwheels.name: Triple Speed Chainwheel with Steel Chain Guard (Cotterless)
Multi Speed Chainwheels.description: TRIPLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL WITH STEEL CHAIN GUARD (COTTERLESS)
Multi Speed Chainwheels.visual_notes: Triple crankset with highly polished chrome steel plate chain guard. Bright polished chrome crank arm, cotterless (square taper) mounting. Silver steel rings.

Multi Speed Chainwheels.name: Triple Chainwheel with Plastic Chain Guard (Cotterless)
Multi Speed Chainwheels.description: TRIPLE CHAINWHEEL WITH PLASTIC CHAIN GUARD (COTTERLESS)
Multi Speed Chainwheels.visual_notes: Entirely deep black triple crankset. Matte black plastic disc chain guard on outermost gear. Solid deep black crank arm, cotterless mounting. Inner rings also black steel.

Multi Speed Chainwheels.name: Triple Speed Chainwheel All Black with PVC Crank and Chain Guard
Multi Speed Chainwheels.description: TRIPLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL ALL BLACK WITH PVC CRANK AND CHAIN GUARD
Multi Speed Chainwheels.visual_notes: Completely deep matte black triple crankset with a solid matte black plastic disc chain guard. PVC/plastic crank arm in matching deep matte black. All rings are black steel.

Multi Speed Chainwheels.name: Triple Speed Chainwheel with Silver Grey Powder Coated Crank
Multi Speed Chainwheels.description: TRIPLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL WITH SILVER GREY POWDER COATED CRANK
Multi Speed Chainwheels.visual_notes: Triple crankset with no chain guard. Three visible black steel chainrings. Defining feature is the silver-grey powder-coated crank arm. Cotterless (square taper) mounting.

Multi Speed Chainwheels.name: Assorted Crank Arms

variants.A: Cottered Crank CP - Bright chrome, traditional cotter-pin mounting hole
variants.B: Cotterless Crank Black Powder Coated - Deep matte black, square taper mounting
variants.C: Cotterless Crank PVC Grey Plate Type - Light grey plastic-coated, cotterless mounting
variants.D: Silver Grey Powder Coated - Silver-grey finish, cotterless mounting

Multi Speed Chainwheels.visual_notes: Four distinct replacement crank arms laid out horizontally: chrome cottered, black powder coated, grey PVC, and silver-grey powder coated.

Hubs.name: Philips Hub Set
Hubs.description: PHILIPS STYLE FRONT & REAR HUB SET

specifications.front: Thick barrel, axle 3/8" X 5.5", 36 Spoke Holes
specifications.rear: Thick barrel, axle 3/8" X 6.5", 36 Spoke Holes. Thread 1.370 X 24 TPI BSCY

Hubs.visual_notes: Traditional robust hub set with solid matte black barrel and bright silver axle ends. Standard 14G large flanges.

Hubs.name: Raleigh Hub Set
Hubs.description: RALEIGH STYLE FRONT & REAR HUB SET

specifications.front: Thin barrel, Hub Axle 5/16" X 5.5" or 6"
specifications.rear: Thin barrel, Hub Axle 3/8" X 6.5", 36 Spoke Holes. 1.370 X 24 TPI BSCY or 34.7 X 1mm pitch

Hubs.visual_notes: Elegant minimalist hub set with continuous thin polished chrome barrel and matching chrome bolt-on axles. Small flanges.

Hubs.name: Oval Hub Set
Hubs.description: OVAL STYLE FRONT & REAR HUB SET

specifications.front: Open ends, BCP, Hub Axle 3/8" X 5.5"

Hubs.visual_notes: Defined by smooth oval/barrel-shaped central body. Large circular flanges.

Hubs.name: Under Cut Hub Set
Hubs.description: UNDER CUT STYLE FRONT & REAR HUB SET

specifications.front: Open ends, BCP Hub Axle 3/8" X 5.5"

Hubs.visual_notes: Heavy-duty MTB style hub with larger central barrel that steps down in diameter at the flanges. Large circular flanges.

Hubs.name: Rickshaw Hub
Hubs.visual_notes: Extreme duty, high-spoke count hub with massive wide central barrel. Unique decorative rectangular speed-holes cut into large flanges. Heavy-duty axle with large cone nuts.

Hubs.name: MTB Quick Release Oval Hub Set (Golden)
Hubs.description: MTB QUICK RELEASE OVAL HUB SET

specifications.rear: 3/8" X 136, Thread 34.8 X 24 TPI, Across Nut 96/98/100
specifications.axle_type: 5mm Quick Release skewer (Silver skewer, Black handle)

Hubs.visual_notes: Performance MTB set with continuous simple oval central barrel in a deep reflective golden finish. Includes silver and black quick-release skewers. Simple clean flanges.

Hubs.name: MTB Quick Release Oval Hub Set (Chrome)
Hubs.description: MTB QUICK RELEASE OVAL HUB SET

specifications.rear: 3/8" X 136, Thread 34.8 X 24 TPI, Across Nut 96/98/100
specifications.axle_type: 5mm Quick Release skewer (Silver skewer, Black handle)

Hubs.visual_notes: Identical structure to S-95 (performance MTB, continuous oval body) but with flawless deep polished chrome finish. Includes silver and black quick-release skewers.

Hubs.name: Hub Step / Axle Peg Set
Hubs.description: HUB STEP WITH HEXAGON BOTTOM & HUB STEP WITH COLOURED LINES (ALSO AVAILABLE IN ALUMINIUM)

specifications.left_step: Full knurling, smooth rounded bottom with internal hexagon interface
specifications.right_step: Reduced/partial knurling at top, smooth barrel with horizontal cut lines (coloured red/blue/gold)

Hubs.visual_notes: Heavy-duty steps with varied surfaces for grip and style. Polished chrome (BCP) with subtle colored details on the right step.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Raleigh Type Hub Axle Set

specifications.finish: Available in Black, NP, or ZP

Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Standard threaded axle pair with cones, nuts, and washers. Dark grey/black finish.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: A Model Hub Axle Set

specifications.finish: Available in Black, NP, or ZP

Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Standard threaded axle pair in silver-toned (NP or ZP) finish, complete with standard nuts and cones.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Raleigh Type Old Model Axle
Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Single threaded axle with highly polished finish on the axle, cones, and standard hexagon nuts.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Feather Type Axle with Dust Cap
Hub Axles & Bearings.description: FEATHER TYPE WITH DUST CAP, FRONT & REAR
Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Distinguished by black cones and standard nuts with a black dust cap assembly. Front axle features a larger extended black dust cover. Black steel axles.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Multi Speed Hub Axle
Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Silver-toned (NP or ZP) axle pair. Rear axle is significantly longer with extended section to accommodate multi-speed freewheel clusters. Silver cones and standard nuts.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Cart Hub Axle
Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Heavy-duty single large-diameter black-finished axle assembly with large-diameter black cones/cups and oversized silver-toned hexagon nuts and check nuts.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Quick Release Hub Axle Set
Hub Axles & Bearings.description: QUICK RELEASE WITH HUB AXLE, FRONT & REAR
Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Full hub axle replacement set integrated with quick-release skewers. Black hollow-core axles with matching black internal cones. Black QR handles.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Quick Release Skewer Set
Hub Axles & Bearings.description: QUICK RELEASE FOR HUB, FRONT & REAR
Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Pair of traditional 5mm quick-release skewers with thin silver-toned shafts, silver acorn nuts and springs at both ends, and distinct black handles.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Hub Cup Rear
Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Large-diameter polished metallic bearing cup with distinct copper/brass tone. Designed as outer bearing race for rear hub with smooth ground interior bearing track.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Hub Cup Front 5/16"
Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Identical structure to S-108 but smaller diameter for 5/16" front hub axles. Same copper/brass tone polished finish.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Hub Cone Front 5/16"
Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Small silver-toned threaded bearing cone with hexagonal section for adjustment and precision-ground curved bearing race, sized for 5/16" front axle.

Hub Axles & Bearings.name: Hub Cone Rear
Hub Axles & Bearings.visual_notes: Identical to S-110 but sized for larger 3/8" rear axle with larger diameter and internal thread. Silver-toned metallic finish.

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.name: B.B. Axle - Phillips Type
Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.visual_notes: Polished silver/chrome metallic finish with raised shoulders and a cotter pin notch near the right end.

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.name: B.B. Axle - Raleigh Type
Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.visual_notes: Two-toned metallic axle with a blackened/dark central section between the bearing shoulders and notched ends for cotter pins.

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.name: B.B. Axle - French Type
Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.visual_notes: Entirely matte black/dark finished cottered axle with standard notches at both ends.

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.name: MTB Cotterless Axle
Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.description: MTB COTTERLESS AXLE WITH WASHERS & BOLTS
Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.visual_notes: Matte black square-tapered axle complete with threaded bolts and washers pre-installed on both ends.

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.name: Thomson Type B.B. Axle & Cup Set
Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.description: THOMSON TYPE B.B. AXLE & CUP SET

specifications.components: Includes axle, integrated cups, and threaded hardware

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.visual_notes: Complete bottom bracket assembly showing the central axle fitted with pressed flared metal cups, threaded cones, and locknuts.

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.name: B.B. Cups - Philips Type

specifications.threads: 34.8 MM x 24 TPI BSCY RH & LH THREADS
specifications.alternative_sizes: Also available in 35 MM & 35.5 MM diameter

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.visual_notes: Silver-toned metallic threaded cup alongside a thin, notched outer lockring.

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.name: B.B. Cups - Raleigh Type

specifications.threads: 34.8 MM x 26 TPI / 24 TPI BSCY RH & LH THREADS

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.visual_notes: Metallic bottom bracket cup accompanied by a notched lockring and a thick, black rubberized or plastic seal ring.

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.name: B.B. Cups - French Type

specifications.threads: 35 MM x 1 MM PITCH ISO - METRIC RH & RH THREADS

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.visual_notes: Metallic stepped cup, a minimal notched lockring, and a thick black cylindrical spacing ring.

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.name: MTB for Cotterless Axle Cups

specifications.finish: Black or Z/P (Zinc Plated) with washers & bolts

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.visual_notes: Hexagonal flanged metallic cup, a thin notched lockring, and a flat silver washers plate.

Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.name: Ball Retainer for B.B. Sets & Hubs
Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.description: BALL RETAINER FOR B.B. SETS & HUBS IN 7, 8, 9 BALLS
Bottom Bracket Axles & Cups.visual_notes: Two circular caged ball bearing retainers displaying evenly spaced chrome steel balls.

Front Forks.name: Front Fork - SLR Type
Front Forks.visual_notes: Bright red bicycle fork with a metallic steerer tube and curved, slender blades featuring chrome/BCP thimbles at the crown.

Front Forks.name: Front Fork - Raleigh Type
Front Forks.visual_notes: Black bicycle fork featuring a curved blade design and distinctive bright BCP/chrome thimbles at the fork crown.

Front Forks.name: Front Fork - Philips Type
Front Forks.visual_notes: Elongated black fork designed for traditional roadster bicycles, featuring a shiny chrome crown cap and curved dropouts.

Front Forks.name: Front Fork - Double Pipe
Front Forks.visual_notes: Heavy-duty black fork featuring a classic twin-tube or double-pipe crown structure reminiscent of vintage Robin Hood styles.

Front Forks.name: Front Fork - French Type
Front Forks.visual_notes: Bright blue painted bicycle fork with clean, tapered lines and classic curved blades ending in open dropouts.

Front Forks.name: Front Fork - Robinhood Type
Front Forks.visual_notes: Dark blue variant of the dual-pipe reinforced fork crown structure, built for large 28-inch wheels.

Front Forks.name: Front Fork - MTB with Pivots
Front Forks.description: MTB WITH PIVOTS PRESSED / FORGED ENDS
Front Forks.visual_notes: Red mountain bike style fork with integrated brake boss pivots protruding on the inner blades, featuring thick forged dropouts.

Front Forks.name: Front Fork - MTB 26"
Front Forks.visual_notes: Sleek, dark-painted or black rigid mountain bike fork with contoured oval blades optimized for 26-inch wheels.

Front Forks.name: Front Fork - BMX
Front Forks.visual_notes: Compact, stout pink/magenta BMX fork featuring thick, heavily reinforced multi-hole peg/dropout plates at the blade tips.

Front Forks.name: Fork Guard
Front Forks.visual_notes: A pair of long, slender, chrome-plated spring steel rods with tightly coiled accent sections near the mounting ends.

Front Forks.name: Fork Fittings - Raleigh Type
Front Forks.visual_notes: Vertical stack of 5 headset components consisting of a locknut, threaded top race, keyed washers, and bottom races in mixed chrome and dark finishes.

Front Forks.name: Fork Fittings - BMX Set
Front Forks.visual_notes: Stack of 5 robust BMX headset pieces including a thick black spacer ring, notched lock ring, and heavy-set metallic cups.

Front Forks.name: Fork Fittings - French Type
Front Forks.visual_notes: Set of 6 polished silver-toned headset components featuring fine threading and low-profile lockrings.

Front Forks.name: Fork Fittings - Zebra / Swedish Set
Front Forks.visual_notes: A collection of 6 dark-coated and silver metallic concentric hardware rings including a flared lower cone race.

Front Forks.name: Fork Fittings - Philip Type
Front Forks.visual_notes: Comprehensive 7-piece headset stack displaying varying profiles of threaded rings, flat keyed washers, and bearing race cups.

Front Forks.name: Fork Fittings - Italian Type
Front Forks.description: ITALIAN TYPE SET OF 8 PCS WITH BALL RETAINER.
Front Forks.visual_notes: Premium 8-piece kit uniquely showing integrated caged ball bearing retainers nested among the polished cups and threaded lock hardware.

Handlebars.name: Handle Bar - NRR Model
Handlebars.description: NRR MODEL BCP WITH SIDE PULL BRAKES
Handlebars.visual_notes: Traditional upright chrome handlebar with an integrated stem, fitted with black end grips and dual side-pull brake rod levers running parallel to the main bar.

Handlebars.name: Handle Bar - Raleigh Model
Handlebars.description: RALEIGH MODEL BCP CENTRE PULL BRAKES
Handlebars.visual_notes: Chrome-plated tourist-style handlebar with integrated rod linkages configured centrally for traditional center-pull roller brakes.

Handlebars.name: Handle Bar - Philips Type
Handlebars.description: PHILIPS TYPE BCP WITH SIDE PULL BRAKES
Handlebars.visual_notes: Classic swept-back bright chrome handlebar with integrated stem assembly and dual side-pull brake rod linkages.

Handlebars.name: Handle Bar - SLR
Handlebars.description: SLR BCP WITH PVC GRIPS & ADJUSTABLE STEM
Handlebars.visual_notes: Slightly swept-back sports-style chrome handlebar featuring clear or light-toned PVC hand grips and an adjustable clamp-style forward stem.

Handlebars.name: Handle Bar - MTB Bent Pattern
Handlebars.description: MTB BENT PATTERN WITH ADJUSTABLE MTB STEM
Handlebars.visual_notes: Slightly raised or riser-style chrome mountain bike handlebar complete with textured black rubber grips and a sturdy black adjustable stem.

Handlebars.name: Handle Bar - Balloon Type
Handlebars.description: BALOON TYPE BCP WITH SIDE PULL BRAKES
Handlebars.visual_notes: Wide, flat-profile chrome handlebar designed for balloon-tire cruiser bikes, featuring integrated long-reach side-pull brake levers and black hand grips.

Handlebars.name: Handle Bar - BMX
Handlebars.visual_notes: High-rise chrome BMX handlebar with a welded horizontal reinforcement crossbar, fitted with vibrant red ribbed safety grips.

Handlebars.name: Handle Bar - MTB Straight Pattern
Handlebars.visual_notes: Minimalist, flat straight-line black/dark finished handlebar with extended black textured grips and a simple central stem clamp area.

Handlebars.name: Handle Bar - Reverse Model (Racing)
Handlebars.visual_notes: Classic dropped racing handlebar with deep down-turned hooks, a bright chrome finish, black rubber sleeve grips on the drops, and an integrated quill stem.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Handle Stem - MTB Regular
Handle Parts & Stems.description: HANDLE STAMPS : MTB REGULAR
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Matte black quill stem with a textured, wedge-cut bottom expander and a standard single-bolt front handlebar clamp.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Handle Stem - MTB with Cable Guide
Handle Parts & Stems.description: HANDLE STAMPS : MTB WITH CABLE GUIDE
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Dark finished bicycle quill stem featuring an integrated internal routing hole or guide loop for center-pull brake cables near the bend.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Handle Stem - Zoom with Cable Guide
Handle Parts & Stems.description: HANDLE STAMPS : ZOOM WITH CABLE GUIDE
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Elongated matte black quill stem with a sharp forward extension, equipped with an integrated brake cable routing guide.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Handle Stem - SLR
Handle Parts & Stems.description: HANDLE STAMPS : SLR
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Polished chrome-plated vintage quill stem with a short forward neck and a standard binder bolt.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Handle Stem - Deep Drop Racer Bar
Handle Parts & Stems.description: HANDLE STAMPS : DEEP DROP RACER BAR
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Bright chrome-plated road racing quill stem with an elongated forward extension and specialized binder clamp for drop bars.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Handle Stem - BMX with Alloy Top
Handle Parts & Stems.description: HANDLE STAMPS : BMX WITH ALLOY TOP
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Chrome-plated quill shaft paired with a blocky, 4-bolt red anodized alloy faceplate/top clamp designed for BMX bars.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Expander Bolt - One Piece Hollow BCP
Handle Parts & Stems.description: EXPANDER BOLT : ONE PIECE HOLLOW BCP EXPANDER BOLT
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Long, silver-finished hollow tension bolt with threaded end, used to secure the stem inside the fork steerer.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Expander Bolt - Hexagonal Head with Swaged Cone & Washer
Handle Parts & Stems.description: EXPANDER BOLT : HEXAGONAL HEAD WITH SWAGED CONE & WASHER
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Long metallic bolt featuring a standard external hex head on top and a pre-fitted wedge-shaped swaged cone at the bottom.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Expander Bolt - Allen Head with Swaged Cone
Handle Parts & Stems.description: EXPANDER BOLT : ALLEN HEAD WITH SWAGED CONE
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Sleek expander bolt with a recessed internal hex (Allen) head and an attached mechanical expansion wedge.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Expander Bolt - Hexagonal with Tapered Cone & Washer
Handle Parts & Stems.description: EXPANDER BOLT : HEXAGONAL WITH TAPERED CONE & WASHER
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Long stem bolt with a hexagonal head, featuring a flat washer and a distinct smooth tapered round expansion cone.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Expander Bolt - Hexagonal
Handle Parts & Stems.description: EXPANDER BOLT : EXPANDER BOLT HEXAGONAL
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Standard elongated hex-head stem bolt fitted with a simple black spacer block/bushing along the upper shaft.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Reflector Brackets
Handle Parts & Stems.description: LAMP & REFLECTOR BRACKETS : REFLECTOR BRACKETS
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Stamped metallic sheet brackets with circular mounting holes, designed to mount safety reflectors onto the frame or fork.

Handle Parts & Stems.name: Lamp Brackets
Handle Parts & Stems.description: LAMP & REFLECTOR BRACKETS : LAMP BRACKETS
Handle Parts & Stems.visual_notes: Polished metal brackets featuring patterned cutouts (including shapes like 'S' and 'H') on the upper extension for traditional headlamp mounting.

Brake Sets & Parts.name: Caliper Brakes - SLR Type
Brake Sets & Parts.description: CALIPER BRAKES : SLR TYPE - COMPLETE WITH SHEET METAL LEVERS, SIDE PULL, POWDER COATED / BNCP.
Brake Sets & Parts.visual_notes: A complete brake assembly kit displaying two bright chrome-plated side-pull calipers with brake pads, corresponding sheet metal drop-style brake levers, black outer brake cables, and mounting hardware.

Brake Sets & Parts.name: Caliper Brakes - MTB/BMX Type
Brake Sets & Parts.description: CALIPER BRAKES : FOR MTB/BMX BIKES - SIDE PULL, HIGH DENSITY STEEL MADE. SOLID LEVERS, BNCP/POWDER COATED
Brake Sets & Parts.visual_notes: A brake kit featuring black-coated heavy-duty steel side-pull caliper arms, sturdy black solid-style hand brake levers, black cable housings, and silver hardware components.

Brake Sets & Parts.name: Cantilever Brakes Set
Brake Sets & Parts.description: CANTILEVER BRAKES : COMPLETE SET LOW PROFILE, ADJUSTER VERTICALLY & HORIZONTALLY, RIGID STEEL ARMS. POWDER COATED/BNCP.
Brake Sets & Parts.visual_notes: A breakdown of a complete low-profile cantilever brake system, showing four black rigid brake arms with adjustable post-mount brake pads, black brake levers, straddle cables with carrier links, and pivoting mounting bolts.

Brake Sets & Parts.name: Philips Type Brake Set
Brake Sets & Parts.visual_notes: Traditional rod-operated side-pull brake linkage set featuring long silver chrome-plated pull rods, mounting frame clips, guided horseshoe stirrups with brake blocks, and mechanical lever pivoting connections.

Brake Sets & Parts.name: Demi Balloon Brake Set
Brake Sets & Parts.visual_notes: Polished chrome caliper assembly consisting of standard horseshoe calipers, matching silver metal handle levers, and thin coiled brake cables.

Brake Sets & Parts.name: Raleigh Type Roadstar Brake Set
Brake Sets & Parts.description: RALEIGH TYPE SUITABLE FOR ROADSTAR BIKES, CENTRE PULL

specifications.type: Centre Pull Roller Rod Brake Set

Brake Sets & Parts.visual_notes: A comprehensive vintage-style center-pull rod brake mechanism layout, featuring prominent triangular stirrups, extended chrome connection rods, frame mounting clamps, and specialized horizontal rubber pad shoe blocks.

Brake Levers.name: Brake Levers Assortment
Brake Levers.description: BRAKE LEVERS : VARIOUS MODELS FROM A TO M PLASTIC COATED, BCP AND POWDER COATED
Brake Levers.visual_notes: An expansive line-up of thirteen unique bicycle hand brake levers labeled A through M. Models A, B, and C display high-shine chrome (BCP) metal finishes; models D, E, F, H, I, J, K, L, and M feature matte or glossy black coated designs; and model G shows a distinct translucent white or light-yellow plastic composite body.

Brake Shoes.name: Brake Shoes Assortment
Brake Shoes.description: BRAKE SHOES : VARIOUS MODELS FROM A TO P
Brake Shoes.visual_notes: A grid matrix showcasing fifteen varieties of black rubber bicycle brake blocks/shoes with integrated metal mounting posts or threaded studs, labeled letters A through P (omitting L). Shapes vary across short caliper pads, traditional curved blocks, blocky shapes, and elongated smooth/ribbed mountain bike or cruiser style pads.
